metadata.description: Global Mind Solutions plugin marketplace for Claude Code. First plugin: acs (Autonomous Coding Skills). Plugin updates reach users only when the plugin's own version bumps (see plugins/acs/CHANGELOG.md).

plugins.name: acs
plugins.description: Autonomous Coding Skills - an agentic software-delivery workflow: PRD, architecture, tickets, design, specs, TDD implementation with review loop, PR, and merge; hook-gated, resumable, workspace-backed.
